1.questionText: Concept Development Completed or Prior Art Search Conducted
Potential End-users or Target Beneficiaries and Potential Industry Relevance Identified
1.toolTip: Already identified who will benefit or who will use the developed technology (farmers, aquaculture operators, extension workers, laboratories, etc.)

2.questionText: Initial Prototype of Device or Diagnostic Kit Created
First Prototype or Kit Tested for Basic Functions
Preliminary Assessment of User Requirements and Operational Feasibility

3.questionText: Working Prototype/Device Refined for Usability, Accuracy, and/or Portability
Tested for Sensitivity, Specificity, or Measurement Accuracy Under Laboratory Conditions

4.questionText: Device/Kit Validated with Positive Result Under Laboratory or Controlled Field Conditions
Analytical Performance Confirmed (i.e.: Detection Limits, Repeatability, or Reliability)
Market Viability Assessed using At least Secondary Data
Potential Industry Partner for Industry Testing Identified

5.questionText: Device/Kit Tested Under Pilot-scale or Semi-field Conditions
User Manual for the Use of Device/Kit Established
Product Promotion using Basic Technology Profile or Techno Demo Conducted
Initial Meeting with Potential Industry Partners
Initial Business Model Canvas (BMC) Accomplished

6.questionText: Agreement with Industry Partners for Product Testing Secured
Device Performance Tested in Multiple Locations
Production/Fabrication/Assembly Manual Established for Scalable Manufacturing

7.questionText: Successful Industry Validation and Replication of Device/Kit
Standardized Protocol/Manual for Industry-scale Production/Fabrication/Assembly of Device/Kit
Letter of Intent for Licensing Secured
Processing of Requirements for Bureau of Animal Industry (BAI) or Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources (BFAR) or third-party Validation Initiated

8.questionText: Device/kit ready for commercial-scale production (replicable without error)

9.questionText: Technology Licensing Agreement Signed
Technology Fully Commercialized/Device or Kit Commercially Available to Target Users
